title: cogswellia donnellii
intro: Cogswellia donnellii, also known as Cogswellia, is a flowering plant native to India and Sri Lanka. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to treat various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cogswellia donnellii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its roots in water, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
